title: Session Config
subtitle: Session-related AI features and tool execution behavior

sessionTitle.title: Auto Session Title
sessionTitle.subtitle: AI automatically generates concise titles for new conversations
sessionTitle.warning: Session title will use first 20 characters of user message

agentCompanion.title: Agent companion
agentCompanion.subtitle: Show konglingcompanion in the collapsed chat input.

toolExecution.sectionDescription: Confirmation and timeout settings when tools run in a session.

computerUse.sectionDescription: In the 空灵语言 desktop app, the assistant can capture the screen and control the mouse and keyboard; requires a multimodal model for vision.
computerUse.enableDesc: When off, the ComputerUse tool stays disabled in every session mode.
computerUse.desktopOnly: Computer use settings are only available in the 空灵语言 desktop app.

browserControl.sectionDescription: Reuse your default browser with logins, cookies, and extensions.
browserControl.desktopOnly: Browser control is only available in the konglingdesktop app.
browserControl.restartFailed: Failed to restart browser with debug mode enabled

restartModal.title: Enable browser debug mode
restartModal.description: {{browser}} is already running and the current instance was not started with the debug port enabled. konglingneeds to restart the browser in debug mode before it can control it.
restartModal.warning: This will close the current browser windows.

browserControl.createLauncherDesc: Create a browser shortcut with the debug port enabled.

models.empty: No available models. Please add models in "Models" first.

maxRounds.label: Maximum dialog rounds
maxRounds.description: Maximum number of AI rounds per dialog turn before pausing. Increase for complex tasks.
